chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6456 of 2024 CP D 6405 of 2024 CP D 6442 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.28828/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.01.2025 Mr. Abdul Rehman Adeed, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Inzamam Sharif, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Kamran Khan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abro, Registrar, Appellate Tribunal, Sindh Board of Revenue. These Petitions were filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the appeals before the Appellate Tribunal Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi. The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of these petitions with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeals, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, these petitions are disposed of by directing the Appellate Tribunal Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeals expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioners, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeals. Petitions stand disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). Office to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
